name: Christmas Surprises
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar together until smooth.
2. Add the egg and mix well.
3. Sift the dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, salt) into a separate bowl.
4. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients to the creamed mixture, mixing until just combined.
5. Stir in the vanilla extract.
6. Using an ice cream scoop or spoon, drop rounded portions of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets.
7. Make a small indentation in the center of each cookie using your finger or a spoon.
8. Fill the indentation with jam or jelly.
9. Sprinkle coconut evenly over the top of each cookie.
10. Bake at 375°F for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
End of recipe instructions
